title: Blue Canyon Pebble Mildew Resistant Shower Mat 53cm x 53cm (Clear) (Clear)
features: PEBBLE MATS Stylish and modern mat for safety in your bath or shower. Made from mildew resistant vinyl with suction pads on reverse.
